tool_input.content:
# SpotBugs rule -> Clean Code heuristic mapping
# Format: <key>=<heuristicCode>,<severity>,<confidence>,<urlSlug>
# Keys are either "<CATEGORY>/<TYPE>" (specific) or "<CATEGORY>" (fallback).
# Specific type entries take precedence over category-level fallbacks.
# URL slugs are resolved against https://spotbugs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugDescriptions.html#

BAD_PRACTICE/BC_UNCONFIRMED_CAST=G4,WARNING,HIGH,bc-unconfirmed-cast-bc-unconfirmed-cast
BAD_PRACTICE/CT_CONSTRUCTOR_THROW=G4,WARNING,MEDIUM,ct-constructor-throw
BAD_PRACTICE/DE_MIGHT_IGNORE=G4,ERROR,HIGH,de-might-ignore
BAD_PRACTICE/DM_DEFAULT_ENCODING=G26,WARNING,HIGH,dm-default-encoding
BAD_PRACTICE/EQ_COMPARETO_USE_OBJECT_EQUALS=G11,WARNING,HIGH,eq-compareto-use-object-equals
BAD_PRACTICE/ES_COMPARING_STRINGS_WITH_EQ=G26,WARNING,HIGH,es-comparing-strings-with-eq
BAD_PRACTICE/HE_EQUALS_NO_HASHCODE=G11,WARNING,HIGH,he-equals-no-hashcode
BAD_PRACTICE/NP_NULL_PARAM_DEREF=Ch7_2,ERROR,HIGH,np-null-param-deref
BAD_PRACTICE/OS_OPEN_STREAM=G4,WARNING,HIGH,os-open-stream
BAD_PRACTICE/RV_RETURN_VALUE_IGNORED_BAD_PRACTICE=G4,WARNING,HIGH,rv-return-value-ignored-bad-practice
BAD_PRACTICE/ST_WRITE_TO_STATIC_FROM_INSTANCE_METHOD=G18,WARNING,HIGH,st-write-to-static-from-instance-method
CORRECTNESS/NP_ALWAYS_NULL=Ch7_2,ERROR,HIGH,np-always-null
CORRECTNESS/NP_NULL_ON_SOME_PATH=Ch7_2,ERROR,HIGH,np-null-on-some-path
CORRECTNESS/RE_BAD_SYNTAX_FOR_REGULAR_EXPRESSION=G4,ERROR,HIGH,re-bad-syntax-for-regular-expression
CORRECTNESS/RV_RETURN_VALUE_IGNORED=G4,WARNING,HIGH,rv-return-value-ignored
MALICIOUS_CODE/EI_EXPOSE_REP=G8,WARNING,HIGH,ei-expose-rep
MALICIOUS_CODE/EI_EXPOSE_REP2=G8,WARNING,HIGH,ei-expose-rep2
MALICIOUS_CODE/MS_MUTABLE_ARRAY=G8,WARNING,HIGH,ms-mutable-array
MALICIOUS_CODE/MS_MUTABLE_COLLECTION_PKGPROTECT=G8,WARNING,HIGH,ms-mutable-collection-pkgprotect
MALICIOUS_CODE/MS_SHOULD_BE_FINAL=G22,WARNING,HIGH,ms-should-be-final
PERFORMANCE/DM_BOXED_PRIMITIVE_FOR_COMPARE=G26,INFO,HIGH,dm-boxed-primitive-for-compare
PERFORMANCE/DM_NUMBER_CTOR=G26,INFO,HIGH,dm-number-ctor
PERFORMANCE/SIC_INNER_SHOULD_BE_STATIC=G18,WARNING,HIGH,sic-inner-should-be-static
PERFORMANCE/SS_SHOULD_BE_STATIC=G18,WARNING,MEDIUM,ss-should-be-static
PERFORMANCE/UUF_UNUSED_FIELD=G9,INFO,HIGH,uuf-unused-field
PERFORMANCE/WMI_WRONG_MAP_ITERATOR=G30,INFO,HIGH,wmi-wrong-map-iterator
STYLE/BC_UNCONFIRMED_CAST_OF_RETURN_VALUE=G4,WARNING,MEDIUM,bc-unconfirmed-cast-of-return-value
STYLE/DB_DUPLICATE_BRANCHES=G5,WARNING,HIGH,db-duplicate-branches
STYLE/DLS_DEAD_LOCAL_STORE=G9,INFO,HIGH,dls-dead-local-store
STYLE/EQ_DOESNT_OVERRIDE_EQUALS=G11,WARNING,HIGH,eq-doesnt-override-equals
STYLE/NP_NULL_ON_SOME_PATH_FROM_RETURN_VALUE=Ch7_2,WARNING,HIGH,np-null-on-some-path-from-return-value
STYLE/RCN_REDUNDANT_NULLCHECK_OF_NONNULL_VALUE=Ch7_2,WARNING,HIGH,rcn-redundant-nullcheck-of-nonnull-value
STYLE/RCN_REDUNDANT_NULLCHECK_WOULD_HAVE_BEEN_A_NPE=Ch7_2,ERROR,HIGH,rcn-redundant-nullcheck-would-have-been-a-npe
STYLE/SF_SWITCH_NO_DEFAULT=G23,INFO,MEDIUM,sf-switch-no-default
STYLE/UC_USELESS_CONDITION=G9,WARNING,HIGH,uc-useless-condition
STYLE/URF_UNREAD_FIELD=G9,INFO,HIGH,urf-unread-field

# Category-level fallbacks (used when no specific type entry matches)
CORRECTNESS=G4,ERROR,HIGH,correctness

# Mapping from Checkstyle check names to Clean Code heuristics.
# Format: CheckName = HeuristicCode | Severity | Confidence | ruleUrlPath
# The ruleUrlPath is appended to https://checkstyle.org/checks/
ParameterNumber = F1 | WARNING | HIGH | sizes/parameternumber.html
MagicNumber = G25 | WARNING | HIGH | coding/magicnumber.html
LocalVariableName = N1 | WARNING | MEDIUM | naming/localvariablename.html
MethodLength = G30 | WARNING | MEDIUM | sizes/methodlength.html
AnonInnerLength = G30 | WARNING | MEDIUM | sizes/anoninnerlength.html
AvoidStarImport = J1 | WARNING | HIGH | imports/avoidstarimport.html
IllegalImport = G12 | WARNING | HIGH | imports/illegalimport.html
InterfaceIsType = J2 | WARNING | HIGH | design/interfaceistype.html
VisibilityModifier = G8 | WARNING | MEDIUM | design/visibilitymodifier.html
HideUtilityClassConstructor = G18 | WARNING | HIGH | design/hideutilityclassconstructor.html
OneTopLevelClass = G12 | WARNING | HIGH | design/onetoplevelclass.html
NeedBraces = G24 | WARNING | MEDIUM | blocks/needbraces.html
LeftCurly = G24 | WARNING | HIGH | blocks/leftcurly.html
RightCurly = G24 | WARNING | HIGH | blocks/rightcurly.html
WhitespaceAround = G24 | WARNING | HIGH | whitespace/whitespacearound.html
EmptyLineSeparator = G10 | WARNING | MEDIUM | whitespace/emptylineseparator.html
MethodName = N1 | WARNING | MEDIUM | naming/methodname.html
TypeName = N1 | WARNING | MEDIUM | naming/typename.html
FinalLocalVariable = G22 | WARNING | HIGH | coding/finallocalvariable.html
SimplifyBooleanExpression = G28 | WARNING | HIGH | coding/simplifybooleanexpression.html
SimplifyBooleanReturn = G28 | WARNING | HIGH | coding/simplifybooleanreturn.html
RedundantImport = G12 | INFO | HIGH | imports/redundantimport.html
UnusedImports = G12 | INFO | HIGH | imports/unusedimports.html
EmptyBlock = G4 | WARNING | HIGH | blocks/emptyblock.html
FileLength = Ch10_1 | WARNING | MEDIUM | sizes/filelength.html
LineLength = G24 | INFO | HIGH | sizes/linelength.html

# PMD rule -> Clean Code heuristic mapping.
# Format: ruleName=code|severity|confidence|category|slug
# category: BP=bestpractices, DS=design, EP=errorprone, CS=codestyle
CyclomaticComplexity=G30|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|cyclomaticcomplexity
NPathComplexity=G30|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|npathcomplexity
ExcessiveMethodLength=G30|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|excessivemethodlength
UnusedPrivateMethod=F4|WARNING|HIGH|BP|unusedprivatemethod
UnusedLocalVariable=G9|INFO|HIGH|BP|unusedlocalvariable
UnusedImports=G12|INFO|HIGH|BP|unusedimports
ExcessivePublicCount=G8|WARNING|HIGH|DS|excessivepubliccount
CouplingBetweenObjects=G8|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|couplingbetweenobjects
AvoidConstantsInterface=J2|WARNING|HIGH|BP|avoidconstantsinterface
CommentedOutCodeLine=C5|WARNING|HIGH|CS|commentedoutcodeline
EmptyCatchBlock=G4|ERROR|HIGH|EP|emptycatchblock
EmptyIfStmt=G12|WARNING|HIGH|EP|emptyifstmt
SwitchStmtsShouldHaveDefault=G23|INFO|MEDIUM|BP|switchstmtsshouldhavedefault
TooManyFields=G8|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|toomanyfields
TooManyMethods=G8|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|toomanymethods
GodClass=G8|ERROR|MEDIUM|DS|godclass
DataClass=G17|INFO|LOW|DS|dataclass
UseLocaleWithCaseConversions=G26|WARNING|HIGH|EP|uselocalewithcaseconversions
LooseCoupling=G8|WARNING|MEDIUM|DS|loosecoupling
CloseResource=G4|WARNING|MEDIUM|EP|closeresource
AvoidReassigningParameters=G22|WARNING|HIGH|BP|avoidreassigningparameters

## G24: long lines L21-L56 (36 lines all >120 chars)
These are very likely a static rule-mapping table (e.g. `Map.entry("BUG_TYPE", HeuristicCode.X)`). The cleanest fix is to MOVE this mapping to a resource file (e.g. `spotbugs-rule-mapping.properties` or `.csv`) and load it at class init. Alternative: split each entry across two lines (still readable). Pick whichever produces clearer code. If neither works, leave the line-length findings and document why.

## Ch7_1: Use Exceptions Rather Than Return Codes

detail:
for f in /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/*/build/reports/clean-code/fix-briefs/*.md; do
  basename=$(basename "$f")
  [[ "$basename" == "_INDEX.md" ]] && continue
  count=$(grep -cE "^- [A-Z]|^- L[0-9]" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  module=$(echo "$f" | sed -E 's|.*/([^/]+)/build/.*|\1|')
  echo "$count $module $basename"
done | sort -rn | head -40

detail:
for f in /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/*/build/reports/clean-code/fix-briefs/*.md; do
  basename=$(basename "$f")
  [[ "$basename" == "_INDEX.md" ]] && continue
  count=$(grep -cE "^- [A-Z]|^- L[0-9]" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  [[ $count -gt 0 ]] && echo "$count"
done | wc -l
echo "---"
for f in /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/*/build/reports/clean-code/fix-briefs/*.md; do
  basename=$(basename "$f")
  [[ "$basename" == "_INDEX.md" ]] && continue
  count=$(grep -cE "^- [A-Z]|^- L[0-9]" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  total=$((total + count))
done
echo "total findings: $(for f in /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/*/build/reports/clean-code/fix-briefs/*.md; do
  basename=$(basename "$f")
  [[ "$basename" == "_INDEX.md" ]] && continue
  grep -cE "^- [A-Z]|^- L[0-9]" "$f" 2>/dev/null
done | awk '{s+=$1} END {print s}')"

description=Fix SuppressionIndex.java prompt=Fix the Clean Code findings on a single Java file. Use the brief verbatim as your spec.

**Brief file**: /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/core/build/reports/clean-code/fix-briefs/SuppressionIndex.md
**Source file**: /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/core/src/main/java/org/fiftieshousewife/cleancode/core/SuppressionIndex.java

Rules:
- Read the brief, then fix every finding it lists.
- Read the project's CLAUDE.md (at /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/CLAUDE.md) to stay consistent with project conventions.
- Edit ONLY the source file (plus test files if compilation or tests require). Do NOT edit other source files.
- Do NOT use OpenRewrite recipes from the refactoring module. Do everything manually via Edit/Write.
- Do NOT run git commit — the main agent will do that after verification. (You should run tests though.)
- Run `./gradlew :core:test` before finishing and make sure tests still pass. If tests fail, fix them.
- If any finding would degrade readability to satisfy a metric, leave it and list in your summary as "intentionally skipped because...".
- Keep each method clear and cohesive. Class length limit is 150 lines, method 50 lines — prefer splitting by responsibility into separate small classes if needed.

Return a short summary (under 150 words):
- Fixed findings: list of codes (e.g. "G22, J1, Ch10_1, F1")
- Skipped findings and reason
- Tests pass: yes/no
- Files changed (absolute paths) subagent_type=general-purpose

detail:
for f in /Users/pippanewbold/CleanClaude/*/build/reports/clean-code/fix-briefs/*.md; do
  basename=$(basename "$f")
  [[ "$basename" == "_INDEX.md" ]] && continue
  [[ "$basename" == "_project-level.md" ]] && continue
  count=$(grep -cE "^- [A-Z]|^- L[0-9]" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  module=$(echo "$f" | sed -E 's|.*/([^/]+)/build/.*|\1|')
  [[ $count -gt 0 ]] && echo "$count $module $basename"
done | sort -rn | head -25
